name: crm-to-web-flow-demo
description: Mock CRM -> validated snapshot -> AI-authored website copy. A sanitized demo of CRM-to-website automation with an anti-hallucination guardrail.

scripts.generate: npm run crm:sync && npm run ai:local
scripts.demo:win: python3 scripts/mock_crm_update.py --opportunity OPP-2026-002 --stage "Closed Won" --probability 1 --amount 1250000 && npm run generate && npm run validate
